_comment: TEST-RUN config for Sheko Ballastpulver (fiber powder) on amazon.it, DataDive niche 8cN8b7h9F5. Built to validate the builder's reusability on a different product + marketplace. SEED values where marked must be refined once the DataDive master keywords and POE related-niches for this niche are available (see TEST-RUN-ballastpulver-it.md).

product_anchor.amazon_account: CONFIRM (Sheko IT seller account on amazon.it)
product_anchor.asin_note: B0GXZRCHQM is the DataDive-tracked niche anchor (used for builder validation). The 1-pack main child is B0D1G28XR5 (per Victor; currently offline on amazon.it) — same parent. Verify B0D1G28XR5 resolves to the fiber Ballastpulver product before using it as the listing reference.

asin_roles.comment: All other ASIN columns in the master/competitors CSVs are competitors for triage.

related_niche_filter._comment: Keep-list = the actual relevant POE related niches for the IT 'fibre' niche (dietary fibre only). The IT 'fibra' niche drifts hard into fiber-OPTIC internet (modem/router/wifi), cosmetics (mascara fibres, toppik) and junk (mosquito net, LED, Christmas tree) — all dropped.
exclude_examples: albero di natale con luci incorporate

triage._comment: SEED tokens. brand_tokens come from the DataDive competitors for 8cN8b7h9F5. form_tokens exclude non-powder forms. claim_tokens: NOTE — unlike collagen (no authorized EU claims), some fibers (e.g. psyllium/psillio) DO have authorized EU health claims under Reg. 432/2012 (intestinal transit, cholesterol). Verify per actual ingredient before excluding a claim term; keep this list conservative.

semantic_opportunity._comment: When no token rule fires, flag as opportunity if relevant AND Sheko under-ranks vs competitors. Otherwise Ignore.

final_action._comment: Same allowed enum + mapping as the DE config. Tunable.

tabs._comment: Same production model as DE. For the test, the curated carry_forward tabs come from whichever template .xlsx is passed via --template (collagen v3 used as a style base = curated tabs are placeholders to replace).
tabs._carry_forward_clear_comment: Product-specific curated tabs from the DE-collagen template are CLEARED to placeholders here, because this is a different product/market — otherwise the IT fibre workbook would ship collagen reviews/competitors/insights.

inputs._comment: Input contract — the builder reads these paths so they aren't recited on the CLI (CLI flags still override). ~ and repo-relative paths are resolved.
inputs.template: output/sheko/seo/Sheko DE Kollagen Powder Keyword Research 2026-06-10 v3.xlsx
inputs.out: output/sheko/seo/Sheko IT Ballastpulver Keyword Research 2026-06-10 v2.xlsx

stale_data_guard._comment: Regression guard for the bug where the Italian fibre workbook inherited German collagen POE review/semantic topics from the style template.
